From our sister site, The New Stack

Is AI Actually Slowing You Down?

Companies are pouring money into AI tools, yet software delivery isn’t getting any faster. Why? Because AI-generated code is being throttled by manual pipelines and legacy hurdles. Join this session to learn:

  • Why AI gains get "absorbed" before they hit production.

  • The CD capabilities high-performing teams build first.

  • How to turn delivery infrastructure into a strategic ROI driver.

Is AI Actually Slowing You Down?

Companies are pouring money into AI tools, yet software delivery isn’t getting any faster. Why? Because AI-generated code is being throttled by manual pipelines and legacy hurdles. Join this session to learn:

-

Why AI gains get "absorbed" before they hit production.

-
